description: Style Note Minimalist styling on a link strap watch from maxima for women, the patterning on the bracelet of this watch is perfect for dressy and casual occasions. Contouring your wrist, this timepiece lends a class to any off-duty ensemble. The new range of watches are a fresh take on the Ssteele eye for perfection and are great for urban wear.  Product Details Case style: Stainless steel oval case  Dial style: Black dial with silver hands  Strap style: Bracelet style steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Ssteele branding on the 3 hour mark and screw to reset time   Waterproof to 3 ATM, allowing you to wear it even when showering Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 22 mm  Case thickness: 4 mm
